backward_compatibility.rationale: Published SGF YL[] values must remain valid. Additive only.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Community tier kept as future placeholder. No code removal.

option_selection.rationale: Multi-Strategy Embedder: covers 50K+ puzzles, DRY/SOLID compliant, extensible via strategy registry.

v2_note: Fundamental replan from v1 (pipeline changes) to v2 (pre-pipeline utility). All v1 artifacts scrubbed.
